title: Prodigy Student

content.problemStatement:
Write a program to input two student's names and percentages and print the name of the student with the higher percentage. In case they score equal percentages, print '**equal**'.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain two strings: the name of the first student and the name of the second student.
The second line of input will contain two percentages: the percentage of the first student and the percentage of the second student.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each test case consists of two lines: the first line contains two strings denoting the names of the two students, and the second line contains two integers denoting their percentages.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a single line containing the name of the student with the higher percentage. If both percentages are equal, output **equal**.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Only one test case. Amit's percentage (95) is higher than Swarup's (92), so Amit is printed.
Doe's percentage (95) exceeds John's (92), therefore Doe is printed.
Both percentages are equal (95), so the special token **equal** is printed.

solution.approach: For each test case we simply compare the two percentages. If the first percentage is larger we output the first name, if the second is larger we output the second name, otherwise we output the special token **equal**. The algorithm is O(1) per test case and uses O(1) extra space.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) total, O(1) per test case.

code.Java: import java.io.*;import java.util.*;public class Main{public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception{BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in));StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();int T=Integer.parseInt(br.readLine().trim());for(int t=0;t<T;t++){StringTokenizer st=new StringTokenizer(br.readLine());String name1=st.nextToken();String name2=st.nextToken();st=new StringTokenizer(br.readLine());int p1=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());int p2=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());if(p1>p2)sb.append(name1);else if(p2>p1)sb.append(name2);else sb.append("**equal**");if(t<T-1)sb.append('\n');}System.out.print(sb.toString());}}

tcGeneratorPython:
def generate_case(i, RINT, POWER):
    # i: test case index (1‑based)
    # RINT(a,b): random integer in [a,b]
    # POWER(a,b): a**b

        t = 1
